'''âzh-g-sh-ch''' ('''kazhagshechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaternalize|quaternalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaternalize|quaternalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-g-sh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kazhagshechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhagshechoko|thizhagshechoko]] || [[word:jizhagshechoko|jizhagshechoko]] || [[word:shizhagshechoko|shizhagshechoko]] || [[word:kizhagshechoko|kizhagshechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
